title: Elon Musk's Philosophy - Stick Figure Edition
style_notes: stick figure style, black on white background, minimalist, simple animation

scenes.description: A stick figure representing Elon Musk stands in front of a complex problem, which then breaks down into simple, fundamental components.
scenes.image_prompt: minimalist stick figure drawing, black lines on white background, a stick figure (implicitly Elon Musk) standing in a thinking pose next to a large, tangled knot of lines representing a complex problem. Next to it, the knot visually disentangles and breaks down into several small, simple, individual geometric shapes. Analytical, clear breakdown. No text, no words, textless.
scenes.narration: Elon Musk famously advocates for 'first principles thinking.' Instead of simply following what others have done, he believes we should break down problems to their absolute fundamental truths.

scenes.description: The stick figure Musk looks up at a starry sky with planets, and a rocket launches in the background, symbolizing his vision for humanity's future.
scenes.image_prompt: minimalist stick figure drawing, black lines on white background, a stick figure (implicitly Elon Musk) looking upwards with a determined yet hopeful expression. Above him, a simple starry sky with a stylized moon and Mars is visible. In the background, a minimalist stick figure rocket is launching into space. Visionary, future-focused, optimistic mood. No text, no words, textless.
scenes.narration: His philosophy also centers on tackling humanity's most significant challenges, from sustainable energy to becoming a multi-planetary species, always pushing the boundaries of what's possible for our future.
